title: Align WatchTowerOversight to host-layer parity
summary: Moves WatchTowerOversight CLI composition behind a host layer and aligns its core-host-pack runtime boundaries with WatchTowerPlan.
scope_items: Introduce a host-owned CLI composition package in WatchTowerOversight.
Reduce watchtower_core CLI ownership in WatchTowerOversight to reusable surfaces and thin compatibility shims.
done_when_items: WatchTowerOversight runs through a host-layer CLI composition boundary with pack-contract and namespaced command support intact.
Shared core does not own repo-specific command-tree composition in WatchTowerOversight.
